---
title: "Releasing A Project"
---

Releasing a project in Studio Modeler makes it available to Studio Administration, where it can be deployed as an application.

To release a project:

1.  Open your project in Studio Modeler.
1.  Go to All projects under the Projects section on the left pane.
2.  Select your project. The Governance project site is displayed.
2.  Optional: Click Validate to see if there are any errors in the project model. This can be done at any stage.
If the project encounters validation errors, a Validation errors found in project's models window with the listed validation error is displayed. Additionally, the log history opens at the bottom of the page in a pop-up box. To validate the project, address the displayed errors.

3.  Click Release. This button also validates the process. The project release window with the project name is displayed. ![Project release window to confirm or cancel the release version](data:image/png;base64,)
4.  Optional: Update the name in the Name field and add a relevant note in the Comment field.
5.  Click Confirm. A confirmation message is displayed at the bottom of the page.
